Product Changelog

Stay up to date with the latest improvements, new features, and bug fixes.

Big milestone! Version 2.4 brings faster load times, smoother UI, and enhanced accessibility.

Version 2.4 — Performance Boost & UI Polish

Released on October 15, 2025

Performance Optimizations

Page load speed improved by 25% and bundle size reduced by 15%.

Refined UI Polish

Better dark mode contrast, spacing, and consistent typography.

Keyboard Shortcuts

Quick navigation commands for faster workflows.

Bug Fixes

Resolved Safari layout inconsistencies and tooltip flickers.

Previous Updates

Performance Boost
v2.3.0

Oct 12, 2025

Major optimizations to improve loading speed and reduce JS footprint.

Accessibility Improvements
v2.2.0

Sep 14, 2025

Enhanced keyboard navigation and screen reader support.

Framework Update
v2.1.3

Aug 28, 2025

Updated to Bootstrap 5.4 and improved overall code stability.

Highlights from Recent Updates

Performance

Startup time reduced and background caching enhanced for all modules.

UI Enhancements

Updated typography, consistent spacing, and smoother hover effects.

Bug Fixes

Resolved reported compatibility issues and improved error logging.

Ready to accelerate your workflow?

Join thousands of teams using our tools to build faster, smarter, and with less effort.
